scenarios.scenario-1: Resend accepts the magic-link payload and returns a delivery identifier.
scenarios.scenario-2: 401 is mapped to an operator-actionable credential error.
scenarios.scenario-3: 429, 500, and timeout conditions are mapped to retryable delivery failures.

critical-invariants.invariant-1: Email payload contains a verification URL rooted at `https://BASE_DOMAIN/verify`.
critical-invariants.invariant-2: Provider-specific errors are normalized before reaching HTTP handlers.

redaction-rules.rule-1: Never log `RESEND_API_KEY` or full message bodies.

verification-levels.module-local: Request build and error mapping tests.
verification-levels.wave-level: Adapter exercised against mocked provider responses.
verification-levels.phase-level: Email request flow shows correct user and operator behavior under provider failures.

production-gates.gate-1: Credential failure, provider throttling, and provider outage are distinguishable in operator evidence.
production-gates.gate-2: Magic-link payload always targets `https://BASE_DOMAIN/verify` and never leaks API credentials.
